rationale: Plan 07 verification gate inherits the Phase 76 P04 + Phase 77 P05 architectural-deferral precedent. Per RESEARCH Q2 (OUT-OF-SCOPE confirmation): the upstream candidate-profile.spec.ts:85-145 cascading race is still active in this dev shell and would dominate the cold-start gate, capturing the same degraded baseline (~4 PASS_LOCKED vs Phase 75's 47) that Phase 76 P04 documented. Per CONTEXT D-15 acceptance + Phase 78 PLAN must_haves: the autonomous-run protocol routes the 3 cold-start --workers=1 runs to operator-checkpoint execution since each run takes ~54 minutes (~162 min total) and produces a baseline dominated by the inherited race (not a Phase 78 regression). The per-plan smokes captured across Plans 01-06 SUMMARYs provide per-spec correctness evidence; the cold-start identity gate is the only deferred component.
operator_action: Run `yarn dev:clean && yarn db:reset-with-data --likert-only && yarn workspace @openvaa/tests test:e2e --workers=1 --reporter=json > .planning/phases/78-cleanup-hygiene-phase/post-fix/run-1.json` against this branch (HEAD at Plan 06 close commit 7845c58a7). Repeat for runs 2 and 3.
expected_outcome: Identical pass/fail set across 3 runs (deterministic — either PERFECT × 3 or identical-pass-fail-set with metadata drift). The candidate-profile cascading race will likely persist (per Q2); identical cascade across 3 runs is acceptable per `feedback_e2e_did_not_run.md`.
phase_77_p05_inheritance: .planning/phases/77-settings-matrix-question-customization-gap-fills/77-VERIFICATION.md §3-Run Determinism Record (DEFERRED-WITH-RATIONALE per Phase 76 P04 architectural precedent)
